properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v5 v6 v7 v2 v3 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I have journeyed Through the long, dark night Out on the open sea By faith alone Sight unknown And yet His eyes were watching me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The anchor holds Though the ship is battered The anchor holds Though the sails are torn

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I have fallen on my knees As I faced the raging sea The anchor holds In spite of the storm

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I've had visions And I've had dreams I've even held them in my hands But I never knew They would slip right through Like they were only grains of sand

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And I have fallen on my knees As I faced the raging sea The anchor holds In spite of the storm

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I have been young But I am older now And there has been beauty That these eyes have seen

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: But it was in the night Through the storms of my life That's where God proved His love to me

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: I have fallen on my knees As I faced the raging seas The anchor holds In spite of the storm
